title: cycas siamensis subsp. inermis
intro: Cycas siamensis subsp. inermis, also known as the Thai cycas or Siamese cycad, is a subspecies of the cycas siamensis plant, a type of ancient gymnosperm native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cycas siamensis subsp. inermis are said to include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
